div.head: The Chief of the Latin American Branch, General Staff, United States Army (Freeman), to the Director of Plans and Operations, General Staff, United States Army (Wedemeyer)This document, along with the letter by Royall (infra), was forwarded by Freeman to John C. Dreier, Chief of the Division of Special Inter-American Affairs in a memorandum dated June 5, not printed.

list.item: To provide the Argentine Government with the six organizational units set forth above, the President was requested to authorize the sale of this matériel under Public Resolution No. 83 of 1940. At noon on 3 June 1948, the President authorized the Secretary of the Army to make the sale. ...
